name: AI Chat
description: Read-only AI assistant that can inspect app data via tools
details: Adds a chat page backed by the app worker's /api/ai/chat route. The assistant uses Vercel AI SDK with Claude via the DeepSpace proxy, and can query records and schemas through read-only tools.
instructions: The frontend uses useChat from @ai-sdk/react which handles streaming and message state.
The backend route at /api/ai/chat uses streamText with read-only tools (schema.*, records.query, records.get, user.current).
AI calls route through the DeepSpace API worker proxy for per-user billing.
patterns: Tool execution happens server-side — the model never talks to storage directly.
maxSteps: 5 limits tool-use rounds to prevent runaway loops.
